name: where_to_buy_7_pages_where-to-buy

missing_or_weak.observation: /pages/where-to-buy returns 404 (canonical: /404) — no retail store locator exists at the standard URL; visitors searching 'where to buy tentree' or 'tentree near me' land on a dead page
Retail distribution presence is unknown — no store locator data available; tentree sells via third-party retailers (REI, MEC, etc.) but online discovery of retail locations is not supported

purchase_path_notes: Where-to-buy is 404. This is the third store of 5 tested with this gap (also mudwtr and tentree). For an apparel brand with retail distribution, a store locator is a measurable traffic capture opportunity.
